input.title: Bold text disappears
input.body:
There is a regression that deletes text as soon as it is made bold.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Create a thought with text `ab`
2. Select `b` and hit <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>b</kbd> to make it bold.
3. Move the caret to the end of the thought
4. Hit Enter

## Current Behavior

- a
- [cursor]

## Expected Behavior

- a**b**
- [cursor]
